reason: No new self-field production kernel was introduced. The existing B_regularized_pure dense quadrature kernel is unchanged; item 02 adds explicit public-wrapper transfer boundaries and focused coverage.

kernel.largest_temporary: float64[n, n, 3] dense displacement tensor plus float64[n, n] factors

wrapper.transfer_boundary: explicit jax.transfer_guard("allow") at public mutable-state boundary

multi_device_cpu_proxy.claim: CPU pmap transform proxy only; no GPU proof or performance claim

validation.command: JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/field/test_selffieldforces.py -k 'regularization_functions_transform_under_strict_transfer_guard or b_regularized_pure_jit_vmap_strict_transfer_guard_matches_wrapper or regularized_coil_self_field_methods_use_strict_transfer_boundary'
JAX_ENABLE_X64=True JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu .conda/jax-0.9.2/bin/python -m pytest -q tests/field/test_selffieldforces.py -k 'regularization_circ or regularization_rect or circular_coil'
